title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.9.0 - Major overhaul. The deck is re-themed around music and creative work, and the 'Tense' keyword is now 'Tuned'. New: Auto Tune (power), Tuning Ritual, Signature, The Wall, and Fate Knocking. Reworked Missed Cue, Joke, All-Nighter, Buy Time, Crib Notes, Procrastinate, All Hands and others; removed four cards. Dozens of cards renamed. Requires BaseLib.
